projects.title: Middleware Tax Enrichment Layer
projects.description: Architected proprietary middleware between 100+ enterprise applications and the Sabrix tax engine, eliminating costly individual changes for every new global tax rule across 100+ countries.
projects.metric: Millions saved in vendor and engineering costs

caseStudy.problem: Every new global tax rule required individual updates across Dell's 100+ enterprise applications, creating engineering bottlenecks, vendor dependency, and operational risk.
approach: Led discovery with Finance, Engineering, and Tax Operations to map application-to-engine touchpoints.
Defined requirements for a centralized enrichment layer to intercept, normalize, and route tax transactions.
Led PRD, development, QA, and production rollout with no disruption to live tax operations.

projects.title: Tax Exemption Management Platform
projects.description: Built a 0 to 1 internal product for exemption certificate upload, storage, search, expiry workflows, and tax engine database integration globally.
projects.metric: 10M+ records migrated, SOX compliant, 150 tax jurisdictions

caseStudy.problem: Dell had no internal global system for customer tax exemption certificates, creating compliance risk and heavy manual overhead across countries and jurisdictions.
approach: Conducted discovery with Finance, Tax Operations, and Legal to define MVP scope.
Designed the certificate lifecycle from upload and validation through search, expiry alerts, and tax engine sync.
Owned the 10M+ record migration plan with phased rollout, validation gates, and zero-downtime execution.

projects.title: Tax Diagnostics, RCA & Observability
projects.description: Transaction-level diagnostic and observability platform instrumented with generative AI tooling for data-driven decision making and faster Finance/Ops resolution.

caseStudy.problem: Finance and Operations teams had no structured way to diagnose tax determination errors across 300K+ annual transactions.
approach: Mapped the full error investigation lifecycle across Finance, Tax Ops, and Engineering.
Designed diagnostic drill-down from transaction to rule to tax engine output.
Integrated generative AI tooling for anomaly detection and root-cause suggestions.

projects.title: Performance & Cost Optimization Platform
projects.description: Cloud-based financial transaction simulation platform that modeled processing at scale before production deployment and optimized global tax operations.

caseStudy.problem: Dell's global financial transaction processing for tax operations had high processing time, high cost per transaction, and limited pre-production simulation.
approach: Mapped bottlenecks across the Oracle ERP to tax engine pipeline.
Defined cloud simulation requirements with Engineering and Finance stakeholders.
Used simulation results to drive targeted optimization and measurable OKR impact.

projects.title: Forest Management Platform (Wood Export)
projects.description: Operational workflows for forestry product catalog, classification, export documentation, and stakeholder coordination for Greenwood World, Bangalore.
projects.metric: Product classification, regulatory flows, data management

projects.title: Yoko ERP - Car Import & Export
projects.description: Converted business needs into technical specs for automotive import/export ERP, coordinating development, SQL scripting, review, testing, and stakeholder meetings.

projects.title: Inventory Management & Point of Sales Application
projects.description: Multi-retailer product catalog ingestion and pricing system with POS, promotions, barcode generation, label printing, SKU mapping, and multi-store sync.
projects.metric: Multi-store POS, SKU mapping, barcode generation

projects.title: HOS & POS Inventory Management
projects.description: Business process analysis, data analysis, UI design, logic building, data integration, end-user training, hardware integration, barcode design, labelling, and fiscal printer integration for a South American retail chain.
projects.metric: Fiscal printer, barcode design, UI design logic

projects.title: Vehicle Import/Export ERP & Dealer Portal
projects.description: ERP for automotive import/export covering dealer onboarding, inventory intake, document processing, shipment tracking, compliance checks, listing workflows, and multi-region document clearance.
projects.metric: 7 functional specs, shipment and fulfillment workflows

projects.title: Content Management System (CMS)
projects.description: CMS powering India's first subscription OTT platform, enabling movie upload, artwork, metadata, pricing, trailers, release scheduling, campaigns, and reporting.
projects.metric: Bulk content ingestion, metadata, SQL-based reporting

caseStudy.problem: Reliance Entertainment was building BigFlix as India's first subscription OTT platform, requiring foundational systems for content operations, subscription commerce, customer support, and physical retail integration.
approach: Owned the 0 to 1 technology architecture and launch execution as Chief Manager Technology.
Built CMS capabilities for movie upload, artwork, metadata, pricing, trailers, modules, release scheduling, campaigns, and reporting.
Supported the broader platform through eCommerce/subscription flows, Talisma CRM workflows, and Focus RT/POS integration for BigFlix retail tie-ins.

projects.title: eCommerce Website - Movie Rental & Subscription
projects.description: Rental subscription workflows, catalog display, offer engines, user journeys, fulfillment triggers, storefront optimization, MIS dashboards, and recommendation flows.

projects.title: Talisma CRM
projects.description: CRM workflows for customer onboarding, support cases, ticket routing, campaign management, user segmentation, issue resolution pipelines, and customer feedback loops.

projects.title: Focus RT ERP
projects.description: Focus RT ERP support for BigFlix's physical retail and fulfillment tie-ins, covering store setup, inventory alignment, hardware integration, operations training, and cross-system coordination with the OTT commerce ecosystem.
projects.metric: ERP support for BigFlix retail integration and fulfillment operations

projects.title: Point of Sales (POS)
projects.description: POS implementation supporting BigFlix's retail touchpoints, including store operations, hardware setup, transaction capture, CRM handoffs, and operational training for rental and customer-service workflows.
projects.metric: Retail touchpoint enablement for BigFlix rental and support workflows

projects.title: Retail Pro Inventory & Sales Management
projects.description: Migrated legacy FoxPro systems to Retail Pro Inventory and Sales for Planet M's 2002-2007 nationwide retail build-out. Set up catalog, pricing, barcode workflows, SKU lifecycle management, and POS operations across 100+ stores.
